since_last: 19% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.28%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 19% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.01% · BTC -2.64% · Gold -2.49% · Nasdaq100 -1.15%. 19% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.28%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.28%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -3.07%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +10.91%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +10.91%, BIDU +4.33%, AVGO +3.53%, ANET +3.46%, AMBA +2.20%. Laggards: CRNC -6.50%, UPST -6.05%, PANW -5.32%, INTC -5.30%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.22% at $147.65
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.22% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
